title: ExampleGenericEvent
description: Template/example schema for ad-hoc events published via eventBus.publish() that do not yet have a dedicated schema (e.g. test/debug topics such as "test.event", "orphan.event"). Copy this file when adding a new event type — do not use it to validate arbitrary production events.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for this event type. Bump on breaking changes.
